content.text:
All 3 active tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `if (item.type === "amulet") return 60;` to `basePremiumForItem`.
- Result: All tests now pass (3 passing, 46 todo).
- Approach: Minimal addition of a single conditional returning the hardcoded amulet base premium of 60G. Combined with existing 10% newcomer surcharge (6G) and 5G processing fee, this yields 60 + 6 + 5 = 71G as expected.
